name: Delivery Note
description: Extract sender, recipient, carrier, and item details from delivery notes.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- delivery_note_number (string)
- delivery_date (date)
- sender_company (string)
- sender_address (string)
- recipient_company (string)
- recipient_address (string)
- carrier_name (string)
- tracking_number (string)
- estimated_delivery_date (date)
- total_weight (number)
- total_packages (number)
- special_handling_instructions (string)
- items (array): each item has description, quantity, weight, unit

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
